memories.content: Waves 1-10 property/deal/document CRUD (2026-01-14). Market Data Pipeline: DB 253K records (2026-02-05). ReportSettings + Zod validation (2026-02-07). Sales Analysis Dashboard: 10 endpoints, 6 visualizations (2026-02-10). Construction Pipeline: 5 DB tables, 6 API clients, scheduler, Leaflet map (2026-02-11). UW Model Grouping Pipeline: 6 modules, 11 endpoints (2026-02-11). UW Model Phase 3-4: 30 groups, 244 files, field remaps, batch extraction, approval workflow (2026-03-03). Activity logging, Docker production config, Technical Debt Cleanup (2026-02-12). Extraction Hardening + Frontend Accessibility (2026-03-03). Login Flow: zustand authStore, LoginPage, RequireAuth, TopNav logout (2026-03-03). Local OneDrive Extraction Pipeline (2026-03-03). Deals Page Overhaul: 12 UW metric kanban cards, aerial maps, activity feed, SharePoint links, stat bar, auth guards (2026-03-04). Deals v5: Return metrics fixed, Zod ?? undefined, Compare Deals overhaul, shadcn CSS variables (2026-03-04, commit 3ed0679). Task 5: Cap Rate TC T3 wiring verified end-to-end — needs extraction re-run to populate (2026-03-05). Task 6: Group Pipeline Frontend — types, 11 hooks, 7 UI components (stepper, group list, detail, conflict report, dry-run preview, batch panel, tab orchestrator), ExtractionDashboard tab layout, backend logging enhancement. 49 new tests (2026-03-05). Task 8: Vite optimization — main chunk 446→386 KB (-13.5%), vendor-icons/dnd/misc extracted, 0 build warnings (2026-03-05). Task 4: Page reviews — Sales Analysis + Construction Pipeline clean, Analytics/Market/Extraction/Properties reviews in progress (2026-03-05). Tests: 1643 backend + 571 frontend = 2214+ total.

conda env: dashboard-backend. Backend port 8000, Frontend port 5173. Dev command: npm run dev:all (concurrent). Git: stash apply over pop, don't push unless asked. NO mock data, NO fake data — show errors instead. User credentials: matt@bandrcapital.com / Wildcats777!! / display name 'Matt Borgeson' (admin role). User demands thorough validation — test ALL files. User open to parallel Claude Agent Teams. User wants to review each dashboard page in depth before deployment. User deferred security audit to later — prioritizes visual verification and page reviews first.

pydantic-settings 2.x: CORS_ORIGINS must be JSON array. Single .env in project root, symlinked from backend/.env. Main DB: PostgreSQL localhost:5432/dashboard_interface_data. Alembic head: 7c415cc1b77a (activity_logs). SQLite in tests: no server_default, DateTime(timezone=True), datetime.now(UTC). Pre-commit hooks: ruff, ruff-format, mypy. React Rules of Hooks: ALL hooks before conditional returns. Auth: OAuth2PasswordRequestForm requires x-www-form-urlencoded with 'username' field. passlib verify_password crashes with UnknownHashError — must wrap in try/except. Property name matching: DB stores 'Name (City, ST)', extraction stores 'Name' — use prefix match with ILIKE. Authorization pattern: require_analyst (GET), require_manager (POST/PUT/DELETE). Zod schemas: Use .nullable().optional() + ?? undefined (NOT ?? 0) for DB fields. TWO API CLIENTS: src/lib/api.ts (axios, auth interceptor) and src/lib/api/client.ts (fetch, auth token). Both attach Bearer token from localStorage. shadcn UI components require CSS variables in :root (index.css) and tailwind.config.js color mappings. SQLite begin_nested() savepoints don't work reliably with StaticPool test sessions — bulk_insert already calls db.commit() internally, so wrap in try/except instead.

SHAREPOINT: FILE_PATTERN=.*UW.*Model.*vCurrent.*, CUTOFF_DATE=2024-07-15. LOCAL: LOCAL_DEALS_ROOT=/mnt/c/Users/MattBorgeson/OneDrive - B&R Capital/B&R Capital - Real Estate/Deals. STAGE_FOLDER_MAP in common.py maps 6 folder names to DealStage values. Default extraction skips dead/realized for speed. 302 total UW models (287 dead, 10 initial_review, 2 closed, 3 realized). 40 deals + 40 properties in DB. CellMappingParser loads ~1,169 mappings. Supplemental mappings in common.py force-overwrite incorrect sheet names: LEVERED/UNLEVERED returns (E39-E44) on 'Returns Metrics (Summary)' NOT 'Assumptions (Summary)'. T3_RETURN_ON_COST (G27, 'Assumptions (Summary)') added as supplemental. All 6 return fields + T3 cap rate in needed_fields and enrichment code in deals.py.

IN PROGRESS: Task 4 page reviews (Analytics, Market, Extraction, Properties agents running). NEXT: Cap Rate TC T3 extraction re-run to populate values. Production hosting (Oracle Cloud Free Tier or Hetzner CX22). FUTURE: Mobile iOS, Security audit.
